Frozen Turban  
 

No Trade
Slot: HEAD
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
AGI: +15
Effect: Resist Cold (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 25.0)
WT: 0.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

This is one of the few items that i might agree is best for a monk. Just trobles me that Verratn keeps putting all all on them.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 18 2002 at 11:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) wtf? MONK ITEM?!?! damn, i'd give this to my ogre mage...
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 04 2003 at 5:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lol, no it would be uber for my beastlord gnome, or i know, my dark elf paladin
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 10 2001 at 9:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OMG THIS IS MOST DEFINATELY A PALADIN ITEM. HAHA just had to fook with all the monks a bit.
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 5:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) we killed lord ;alkfa;sklfja;fklj last night and well, he dropped this AND the tunic. both went to the same monk, and i am very glad about that, if these items didnt go to a monk they would be wasted items.... there are better more fitting items for your class, go look.
RE: l3wt
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 8:34 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Please, go to the search equip section and do a search for human shadowknight headgear, then rank it by AC. So, what do we have now? Well, we have about 5 or 6 helmets that are dropped in ToV, we have the crowns of Dain and the giant king and we have the Kael headgear. That's it! After the above mentioned helmets comes the turban. Sooooo, me being on the dwarf faction, tell me now, is this a great item for me? I can see myself doing this guy with 2 groups in a couple of levels however me and my guild have a long ways to go before we do ToV. I really would like you to respond to this. Should I be in the running for the turban or not?

51 Reaver, The Rathe
▲ Page top
RE: l3wt
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 12:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769051269
74 posts
Sorry to rain on your parade, but the ussual lvl for characters even accepted into groups to lvl up in the velks is 53+. id also like to know how the fight goes. Personally I feel its a bad idea to move any where near far into the velks without a group of 55+ and in near uber gear. Your helmet will be a lot better than this by that time. Thats just my guess, try it out and report back though. Just be ready to have a necro ready for some major corpse recoveries;) Oh yeah, our group was attacked by a mob from the castle gates in velks, and we were in the RR, or right room, our group didnt make it out alive, any of us. The mobs hit me personally for over 300 per hit. Now thats not something 2 groups of ill armored characters can handle. Get at least 4 groups...
▲ Page top
RE: l3wt
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 6:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361502777
41 posts
sorry to rain on your parade, but we did this guy when we were still on Dorf Faction with about 4 groups ~55 so it´s not impossible that he will get there soon (even though 2 groups is a bit off)

anyway, if your gear is superior to this why do him at all?
oh and salute to the necro that earns a fortune from you.. a bard or chanter could do the CR at no cost ;o)

# Jul 14 2001 at 5:01 PM Rating: Default

▲ Page top
...you idiots..there is no other word
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 5:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249615197
9 posts
to you genius monks out there...if your doing this mob in general your doing it with your guild we do it mostly with 3 very strong groups but have done it with 2 strong groups..if your guild is doing it, it will go to monks first fine and dandy unless your guilded with a bunch of fools..then warriors ....but your not going to be rolling for it..its not a pickup group item.

monks dont seem to get this that all the loot they whine about etc on these boards is NOT ROLLED ON LOOT. You dont go to kill the statue of rallos zek with the druid that gave you a port and his cleric buddy, you dont roll on his loot against the necro who you helped to clear crushbone when you were a newbie (last week for some of you).

get a clue
▲ Page top
RE: ...you idiots..there is no other word
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 1:02 PM Rating: Decent
ParadiseLost
Scholar
151 posts
" ..its not a pickup group item. "

Actually I've lead two "pick up group" raids on Bob (what he's called on my sever). Both were successful. This Helm is randomed off to generally the melee unless the GRS doesn't drop (which is rare he seems to always have it) in which case it goes to all. Bob already drops alot of nice monk stuff - Staff, Tunic, Wristband (Warriors don't roll on the tunic or wristband because at 50+ a war has better then an ac 25 tunic) So the boots and this hat go to either melee only or all.

I do agree with you though peeps shouldn't be sitting here arguing over who it's best for etc because it's up to the raid leader to decide. I just happen to be raid leader.
▲ Page top
RE: ...you idiots..there is no other word
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2001 at 5:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248801112
36 posts
READ: ALL/ALL
ALL means Everyone
This is very good for monks but that does not mean it is automatically for them. Even a warrior would like this. Please do not simply go up to items and insist on it being made for one class only. I really hate it when people do that (unless they have good reason to).


▲ Page top
All/All
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 6:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754059435
2 posts
All/All....
It means just that, this item isn't for any specific class.

In groups I believe in need before greed, if this benefits you, why shouldn't you roll? On the other hand, if you are rolling to sell then I have problems.

At anyrate, ANY class would benefit from the 25ac, not just monks.

Well, I think that covers it, Hasta All!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 15 2001 at 9:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Consider these zones where a monk will fight and what he can roll on and use:
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 3:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You seem to have forgotten a few hundred items. Lguk you can get frog king crown and fbss as well as azure sleeves and velks you can get spider fur cloak, choker, belt and shoes just to name a few.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 5:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) my sk would love this item but its true...this IS A MONK ITEM and a great one at that the agi rules
#Anonymous, Posted: May 16 2001 at 9:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) -drool- ac, no wgt.. who the hell said this Efruity dropped crap stuff for his difficulty to kill!?
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 19 2001 at 11:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ***** the monks, i want this on my warrior and my paladin and whomever else i can get one for...agility is damn nice to have, especially in large quantites...never mind the 25ac for the heed...damn...GO VERANT! finally making some huge items without regard! :)
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 27 2001 at 5:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Every time an all / all item with good stats and 1.0 or lower weight comes out, it's automatically a monk item (at least to every monk out there). Only the kael and SS helms are better for the other melee classes (except warrs). I can see this going to a non monk, especially if lord D dropped several of his low weight pieces.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 18 2001 at 9:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) BAH! I am a monk, and ta tell you the truth, anything under weight 1.0, and has even partly descent stats SHOULD be called a monk item. Simply cause we are jipped from AC usually, and thisa is one of very few items that acctually has a special ability for monks as well. Stop complainin, it's all/all, you can get it if ya go solo em for all i care, but for the most part this is a monk item <Grin>
RE: I agree
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 6:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965738757

I want this for me me and me. But if I lost out on a roll to a monk, I would concur that this is a great monk item. But 25 ac on helm that rangers can use? EGADS, or for anyone for that matter. I would only be upset if a caster wanted in on the roll :O
